response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No vocal music present; background instrumental only. 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON confirmed as instrumental-only; manual transcription and translation performed for the entire dialogue between two VTubers. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly anchored to vocal starts; subtitles are segmented to maintain readability during fast-paced cooking conversation.

subtitles.original: 美味しかったけどね
subtitles.english: It was delicious though.

subtitles.original: あ 待って 15分経ったわ
subtitles.english: Wait, 15 minutes have passed.

subtitles.original: 行くか
subtitles.english: Shall we go?

subtitles.original: 行きますかこれ 15分経ったんで
subtitles.english: Shall we go? Since 15 minutes have passed.

subtitles.original: え いいんじゃない？
subtitles.english: Isn't it looking good?

subtitles.original: え 煮込まれてるんじゃない？
subtitles.english: Isn't it being simmered well?

subtitles.original: ちょっと初めて作るからいいのかどうかの判断もつかないんだけど
subtitles.english: It's my first time, so I can't even judge if it's right.

subtitles.original: めっちゃきれいよ なんか
subtitles.english: It looks really beautiful.

subtitles.original: 待って 配信で見て... リアルなとこにいるのに配信で見てる
subtitles.english: Wait, I'm watching the stream... even though I'm right here!

subtitles.original: え いい感じ
subtitles.english: It's looking good.

subtitles.original: いい感じだよね
subtitles.english: It really is, isn't it?

subtitles.original: まぁ今のところただの野菜と鶏煮込みで味は全くついてないんで
subtitles.english: For now it's just stewed meat and veggies with no seasoning.

subtitles.original: あ よかったよかった
subtitles.english: Great, great.

subtitles.original: じゃあここからね オリジナルチャート
subtitles.english: Now, from here, I'll follow my original chart...

subtitles.original: スパイスでの味付けやっていきたいと思います
subtitles.english: ...and start seasoning it with spices.

subtitles.original: はい はい お願いします
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, please do.

subtitles.original: えーっと スパイス量を今確認してるのでちょっと待ってください
subtitles.english: I'm checking the spice amounts now, so please wait a moment.

subtitles.original: えーっとね いろんなレシピを見ててどのレシピだかちょっと分かんなくなっちゃったんだけど
subtitles.english: I've looked at so many recipes that I'm getting a bit confused...

subtitles.original: これや！
subtitles.english: This is it!

subtitles.original: まず コリアンダーを大さじ1なので
subtitles.english: First, it's 1 tablespoon of coriander...

subtitles.original: 小さじ3ね
subtitles.english: ...so that's 3 teaspoons, right?

subtitles.original: 小さじ3分全部入れるんですけど
subtitles.english: I'm going to put all 3 teaspoons in.

subtitles.original: え？
subtitles.english: Eh?

subtitles.original: いいよね？
subtitles.english: It's fine, right?

subtitles.original: いいよね？
subtitles.english: Right?

subtitles.original: なんかみんながえっ？みたいになってるから大丈夫だよね？
subtitles.english: Everyone's reacting like 'Eh?', but it must be okay, right?

subtitles.original: え いいよね 入れます
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's fine. Putting it in.

subtitles.original: 1回火止めてもいいよ
subtitles.english: You can turn off the heat for a bit.

subtitles.original: あ 確かに 止める
subtitles.english: Ah, true. I'll turn it off.

subtitles.original: はい これで 結構多くね？
subtitles.english: Wait, isn't this quite a lot?

subtitles.original: あ 大丈夫 コリアンダーは辛くない
subtitles.english: It's okay, coriander isn't spicy.

subtitles.original: え でも辛くなくても...
subtitles.english: Even if it's not spicy...

subtitles.original: 大丈夫 まぁこれがダメなんだけど
subtitles.english: It's fine. Well, this is the one not to mess up.

subtitles.original: え 何 怖い
subtitles.english: What? That's scary.

subtitles.original: え 何か分かんない スパイスすごい入れてくるから
subtitles.english: I don't know, you're putting in so much spice.

subtitles.original: あ 本当？
subtitles.english: Really?

subtitles.original: え まぁこの量には大丈夫
subtitles.english: Well, for this amount, it's fine.

subtitles.original: え 待って 一応じゃあ小さじ2にしとくか 大さじ1だけど
subtitles.english: Wait, I'll make it 2 teaspoons for now, even if it says 1 tbsp.

subtitles.original: おっ
subtitles.english: There.

subtitles.original: はい 入れて まぁコリアンダーはね 香りだから いくら入っても大丈夫でしょう
subtitles.english: Okay, in it goes. Since coriander is for aroma, it's fine no matter the amount.

subtitles.original: こんで えーっと 次 クミンを小さじ2
subtitles.english: And then, next, 2 teaspoons of cumin.

subtitles.original: 玉ねぎ1個入れてるやつだから大丈夫なはず
subtitles.english: Since there's a whole onion in there, it should be fine.

subtitles.original: クミンを クミン間違えないでね
subtitles.english: Cumin... don't mix up the cumin.

subtitles.original: 待て 1にしとく？ ちょ 不安だから1回1にして
subtitles.english: Wait, should I make it 1? I'm worried, so I'll do 1 first.

subtitles.original: ターメリックが小さじ1だから
subtitles.english: Since turmeric is 1 teaspoon...

subtitles.original: えーっと 小さじ1/2にしとくか
subtitles.english: ...let's make it half a teaspoon.

subtitles.original: え でもクミンは多くてもいいよね？
subtitles.english: But cumin can be plenty, right?

subtitles.original: じゃあ ターメリック小さじ1
subtitles.english: Then, 1 teaspoon of turmeric.

subtitles.original: あ カレーの匂いしてきた！
subtitles.english: Ah, it's starting to smell like curry!

subtitles.original: クミン やっぱクミン入れたら前回トマト煮込みだったのをカレーにしてくれたから
subtitles.english: Cumin... adding cumin turned the tomato stew into curry last time.

subtitles.original: クミンを信じて小さじ2ね これクミンです
subtitles.english: I'll trust the cumin and go with 2 teaspoons. This is it.

subtitles.original: で ターメリックは少しずつ入れて もう小さじ1入れた
subtitles.english: I'll add turmeric bit by bit. Already put in 1 teaspoon.

subtitles.original: で チリペッパーはちょっと小依ちゃんが辛いのが苦手なんで
subtitles.english: As for chili pepper, since I'm not good with spicy food...

subtitles.original: とりあえず1回ほんなちょっと
subtitles.english: ...just a tiny bit for now.

subtitles.original: 本当は小さじ1/2なんだけど 小さじ1/2ってことはだいぶ辛くなるってことだから
subtitles.english: It says half a tsp, but half a teaspoon could make it quite spicy.

subtitles.original: え ちょっとすぎか？
subtitles.english: Is this too little?

subtitles.original: まぁこんなもんかな ちょっと少なめにいれます
subtitles.english: I guess this is enough. I'll put in a small amount.

subtitles.original: で このレシピにはガラムマサラは全く書いてないんだけど
subtitles.english: This recipe doesn't mention Garam Masala at all, but...

subtitles.original: ガラムマサラをいれるとだいぶまた変わってくると思うので
subtitles.english: ...I think adding it will change the flavor significantly.

subtitles.original: ガラムマサラは他のやつで小さじ1/2だったから これもちょっと少なめにいれます
subtitles.english: Another recipe called for half a tsp, so I'll add a little of this too.
